description: Drop-in Python library plus two example sensors that expose a hierarchical registry of named, typed, runtime-mutable variables (doubles/booleans/integers/enums) for live monitoring and tuning. Inspired by IHMC YoVariables. The :demo sensor runs a fake control loop populating ~6 variables across child registries; the :aggregator sensor takes other resources as deps and fans out via DoCommand to merge their registries into a single flat reading map suitable for data-manager capture.

models.short_description: Sensor with a fake control loop demonstrating the variable_tools library end-to-end.
Aggregates variable_tools registries from declared resource deps into one flat reading map.
